artworks.title: Garden at Sainte-Adresse
visual_notes: elevated viewpoint with terrace, sea, and sky arranged in broad horizontal bands
high-key colors with yellow sunlight and blue-gray shadow

artworks.title: Two Men Contemplating the Moon
visual_notes: dusky, muted palette with deep blues, browns, and moonlit highlights
two figures seen from behind in quiet communion with nature

room_profile.display_constraint: one medium horizontal print above a low bookshelf

expected_best_choice.title: Two Men Contemplating the Moon
reasons: Its subdued dusk palette fits the room's blue-gray wall and soft north light.
Its contemplative mood matches the quiet reading-corner brief.
Its horizontal composition suits the wall placement better than a more visually loud choice.

rejected_notes.Garden at Sainte-Adresse: Too sunlit, airy, and bright for the requested subdued mood.
rejected_notes.Wheat Field with Cypresses: Too energetic and visually intense for the intended calm corner.
